Title: Verify User Class Attributes and Operations
Test Steps:
1. Call getusername() on the User object
2. Verify the returned value is "testuser"
3. Call setusername("newtestuser") on the User object
4. Call getusername() on the User object
5. Verify the returned value is "newtestuser"
6. Call getpassword() on the User object
7. Verify the returned value is "testpassword"
8. Call setpassword("newtestpassword") on the User object
9. Call getpassword() on the User object
10. Verify the returned value is "newtestpassword"
11. Call getemail() on the User object
12. Verify the returned value is "testuser@example.com"
13. Call setemail("newtestemail@example.com") on the User object
14. Call getemail() on the User object
15. Verify the returned value is "newtestemail@example.com"
16. Call getadmin() on the User object
17. Verify the returned value is true
18. Call setadmin(false) on the User object
19. Call getadmin() on the User object
20. Verify the returned value is false

Title: Verify User-UserData Association
Preconditions: User and UserData objects are created
Test Steps:
1. Create a UserData object with id "testid"
2. Create a User object and associate it with the UserData object created in step 1
3. Call getUserData() on the User object
4. Verify the returned UserData object has id "testid"
